evals.prompt: Scrape the Metro flyer at https://www.metro.ca/en/flyer and extract all deals as JSON
evals.expected_output: A JSON array of 500+ deal objects with item_name, brand, category, sale_price, regular_price, unit, unit_size, deal_conditions, and price_type fields. Weighted items should have unit='lb' and per-lb pricing. Multi-buy items should have price_type='multi_buy' and deal_conditions like '2 for $7.00'.

assertions.name: extracts_500_plus_deals
assertions.check: JSON output contains at least 500 deal objects

assertions.name: all_deals_have_item_name
assertions.check: Less than 2% of deals have null/empty item_name

assertions.name: all_deals_have_sale_price
assertions.check: Less than 5% of deals have null/zero sale_price

assertions.name: weighted_items_use_lb
assertions.check: Weighted items (per-weight produce, meat) use unit='lb' not unit='each'

assertions.name: multi_buy_detected
assertions.check: At least 1 deal has price_type='multi_buy' and deal_conditions contains 'for $'

assertions.name: categories_mapped
assertions.check: Categories are mapped to pipeline values (produce, meat, seafood, dairy, etc.) not Metro's raw categories

evals.prompt: Parse Metro's online flyer (metro.ca/en/flyer). I need all the produce and meat deals this week with prices.
evals.expected_output: A filtered list of produce and meat deals with accurate pricing. Should correctly identify weighted/per-lb items in these categories.

assertions.name: includes_produce_deals
assertions.check: Output includes deals with category 'produce' or 'Fruits & Vegetables'

assertions.name: includes_meat_deals
assertions.check: Output includes deals with category 'meat' or 'Meat & Poultry'

assertions.name: weighted_produce_per_lb
assertions.check: Weighted produce items show per-lb pricing (not avg. ea. price)

evals.prompt: Run drift detection on the Metro flyer page at metro.ca/en/flyer to check if selectors are still valid
evals.expected_output: A drift detection report showing selector hit rates (should be 8/8 or close), DOM path verification, element count, and page weight metrics. All checks should pass for the current page.

assertions.name: selector_hit_rate_check
assertions.check: Reports a selector hit rate of at least 6/8 (75%)

assertions.name: dom_path_verified
assertions.check: Reports DOM path and confirms not inside iframe
